name: Mr. Turkey Sausage & Vegetable Medley
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Package of Mr. Turkey Smoked Sausage, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch, brown sugar, soy sauce, and ginger.
2. Gradually blend in the broth until the mixture is smooth; set aside.
3. Coat a large, non-stick skillet with vegetable spray.
4. Brown the sausage in the skillet; remove it from the skillet.
5. Add oil and vegetables to the skillet. Cook, stirring for 3-5 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Add the sausage and broth mixture to the skillet. Cook, stirring until the sauce thickens.
7. Serve over hot rice. Makes 5 servings.
Preparation Time: 20 minutes
Cooking Time: 15 minutes
Serving Size: 1 cup turkey vegetable mixture (approximately 221 calories); 2/3 cups rice (approximately 176 calories).
